description: Mike Hudack, CEO of Avian Labs, discusses the efficiency and cost-effectiveness of their web3 payments app, Sling, built on Solana. He highlights the advantages of instant and nearly free international money transfers compared to traditional methods.
topic_summary: Hudack explains how Sling allows users to transfer money internationally at a fraction of the cost and time compared to traditional services, emphasizing the significant improvements in speed and affordability [t=0:24].
